lever_defs.label: Electrify on-site fuel
lever_defs.sub: Gas heating, boilers, fleet. Shifts load to electricity unless paired with cleaner power

lever_defs.label: Buy cleaner electricity
lever_defs.sub: Solar PPAs, renewables, green tariffs. Also abates rebound from electrification

lever_defs.label: Cut travel & commuting
lever_defs.sub: Remote work, transit, procurement, business travel

lever_defs.label: Years to fully implement
lever_defs.sub: Capital turnover delay. Cuts ramp on an S-curve

presets.label: Current trend
presets.desc: No new interventions beyond the forecast.

presets.label: Electrification push
presets.desc: Prioritize fuel switching with cleaner electricity.

presets.label: Travel & commute focus
presets.desc: Best when Scope 3 is a large share.

presets.label: Ambitious path
presets.desc: Aggressive cuts across all scopes on a faster timeline.
